top.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
top.summary: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

top.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
top.summary: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.

top.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
top.summary: Reports say Phelan, whose role was largely administrative, left amid tension over US shipbuilding.

top.title: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
top.summary: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.

top.title: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
top.summary: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.

top.title: Anthropic investigating claim of unauthorised access to Mythos AI tool
top.summary: The AI company has said the model is too dangerous to release publicly because of its hacking capabilities.
